hero.title: Njira Zomangamanga Zomwe Zimakula
hero.subtitle: Mapulogalamu a Enterprise · AI & Machine Learning · Zomangamanga za Mtambo · IoT & Edge
hero.description: Kuchokera ku makina anzeru kupita ku nsanja zamtambo, timapanga zomangamanga ndikupereka luso lomwe limagwiritsa ntchito mabizinesi ofunitsitsa - panthawi yake, pa bajeti, pamlingo.
hero.trustLine: Wodalirika ndi makampani padziko lonse lapansi

services.subtitle: Ntchito Zathu
services.title: Zomangamanga Zonse
services.description: Malo asanu ndi limodzi oyeserera. Gulu limodzi. Gawo lililonse la ukadaulo wanu wamakono - kuchokera ku zipangizo zam'mphepete kupita ku ma dashboard amakampani.

customSoftware.title: Chitukuko cha Mapulogalamu Okhazikika
customSoftware.description: Mapulogalamu amakono omangidwa ndi microservices, APIs, ndi zomangamanga zamtambo.

aiMl.title: AI, ML ndi Business Intelligence
aiMl.description: Mapaipi a AI / ML, ma dashboard a Power BI, ndi ma analytics apamwamba omwe amasintha deta kukhala zosankha.

cloud.title: Zomangamanga za Mtambo ndi Zomangamanga
cloud.description: Zomangamanga zamtambo zambiri zokhala ndi zotengera, zopanda seva, ndi scalability yapadziko lonse lapansi yomangidwa.

iot.title: IoT & Edge Computing
iot.description: Zipangizo zolumikizidwa, mapasa a digito, ndi makompyuta a m'mphepete mwa Makampani 4.0.

devops.title: DevOps & Platform Engineering
devops.description: Mapaipi a CI / CD, zomangamanga monga code, ndi kuwonera kuchokera pakudzipereka mpaka kupanga.

digital.title: Kusintha kwa Digito ndi Kufunsira
digital.description: Njira zamakono, njira zamakono, ndi kufunsira manja.

cta.title: Tiyeni timange china chake chowopsa
cta.description: Kuchokera ku chitukuko cha mapulogalamu amtundu ndi njira zoyendetsedwa ndi AI kupita ku zomangamanga zamtambo ndi makina - timapereka ntchito zamakono zomaliza zogwirizana ndi zofuna zanu.

credibility.subtitle: Mbiri Yathu
credibility.title: Zotsatira, Osati <gradient>Malonjezo</gradient>
credibility.description: Kuchokera ku Sarajevo kupita ku Oslo, Amsterdam, ndi Berlin. Machitidwe ogwira ntchito amaperekedwa panthawi yake, nthawi iliyonse.

atlascopco.label: Mtambo wa IAM wa Atlas Copco
atlascopco.outcome: Anakonza zomangamanga zoyamba zamtambo za One Identity za Atlas Copco pa Azure Kubernetes, kuchepetsa ndalama pamene akusunga kutsatira kwa bizinesi.

orange.label: Pulatifomu ya Orange Cyberdefense
orange.outcome: Kupanga zomangamanga za Azure Kubernetes, mapaipi a CI / CD, ndi kuphatikiza kwachizolowezi cha ServiceNow kwa kampani yotsogola ya cybersecurity ku Ulaya.

telecom.label: Telecom GIS & AR Platform
telecom.outcome: Anamanga nsanja ya GIS kupanga mapu ogwiritsira ntchito pansi pa nthaka ku Germany ndi kudziwika kwa kugundana kuteteza kuwonongeka kwa zomangamanga za Euro mamiliyoni ambiri.

iot.label: Cloud IoT & Edge Platform
iot.outcome: Azure IoT Hub yoyang'anira zikwizikwi za zipangizo, Synapse ikukonzekera mabiliyoni a mizere ya telemetry, ndi m'mphepete mwa aggregation kudula ndalama za uthenga ndi ~ 90%.

drone.label: Pulatifomu yodziyimira payokha ya drone
drone.outcome: Woyang'anira ndege wachizolowezi ndi mlatho wa 4G-to-Azure IoT Hub womwe umapangitsa kuti ndege zodziyimira pawokha za BVLOS ziyang'anire ulimi ndi kutumiza malipiro.

payment.label: Kupulumutsa Dongosolo la Malipiro
payment.outcome: Kupulumutsidwa kulephera malipiro chipata kwa Norwegian m'manja pulogalamu ndi kumbuyo-zomangamanga undocumented cholowa kachidindo. Zero malipiro downtime pambuyo modernization.

game.label: AAA Game Dev Tooling
game.outcome: Anamanga pulogalamu yowonjezera ya Maya yomwe inadula nthawi ya 3D yopanga zitsanzo ndi makanema ojambula ndi 50% pa situdiyo yayikulu ya AAA, yomwe idatengedwa ngati chida chokhazikika mu payipi yopanga.

social.label: Malo Ochezera a Malo
social.outcome: Pulogalamu yopangidwa ndi chibwenzi cha malo ausiku a ku Spain ndi geolocation kufanana, mauthenga a nthawi yeniyeni, ndi zidziwitso zokankhira kwa kasitomala wa UK.

iga.label: Multi-Tenant IGA Platform
iga.outcome: Anamanga pachimake backend kwa mtambo-mbadwa chizindikiritso kayendetsedwe kayendetsedwe nsanja kutumikira makasitomala Fortune 500 ndi mwambo ASP.NET Core Chizindikiritso kwa NoSQL pa mlingo ogwira ntchito.

euAdjacent.title: EU-Adjacent, Global Delivery
euAdjacent.description: CET maola ogwira ntchito omwe ali ndi chidziwitso chokhudza Norway, Netherlands, Germany, ndi kupitirira.

yourEngineers.title: Mainjiniya anu, osati wogulitsa
yourEngineers.description: Mamembala odzipereka a gulu omwe amaphatikizidwa mu ntchito yanu ndi zida. Palibe oyang'anira akaunti, palibe mizere ya tikiti.

hardwareToCloud.title: Hardware ku Mtambo
hardwareToCloud.description: Kuchokera ku firmware ya chipangizo chophatikizidwa kupita ku mapaipi a Azure Synapse. Mapulogalamu athunthu pa wosanjikiza uliwonse.

partners.subtitle: Technology Stack
partners.title: <gradient>Nkhokwe</gradient> Yoyesedwa Ndi Nkhondo
partners.description: Sitimangogwiritsa ntchito zida izi - tatumiza machitidwe opanga nawo. Kuchokera ku Microsoft Azure kupita ku Kubernetes, akatswiri athu amakhala ndi luso lenileni.

cloudInfra.label: Mtambo ndi Zomangamanga
cloudInfra.description: Zomangamanga zamtambo zambiri zokhala ndi orchestration ya chidebe ndi zomangamanga monga code.

frontend.label: Frontend
frontend.description: Zamakono zigawo frameworks ndi mtundu chitetezo ndi wokometsedwa kumanga tooling.

backend.label: Backend & APIs
backend.description: Mapulatifomu a seva yamakampani, zilankhulo zamachitidwe, ndi ma paradigms amakono a API.

data.label: Deta ndi Kusungirako
data.description: Malo ogulitsira maubale, zikalata, ndi kukumbukira ndi kufufuza kwathunthu.

devops.label: DevOps & Tooling
devops.description: Mapaipi a CI / CD, kulamulira mabaibulo, ndi zokolola za opanga.

cloudNative.title: Mtambo-Native ndi kusakhulupirika
cloudNative.description: Pulojekiti iliyonse imakhala yowonongeka, yoyendetsedwa ndi CI / CD, ndipo imamangidwa pamlingo wopingasa kuyambira tsiku loyamba.

fullStack.title: Full-Stack Fluency
fullStack.description: Kuchokera ku React frontends kupita ku .NET microservices kupita ku magulu a Kubernetes - gulu limodzi, kumapeto mpaka kumapeto.

productionProven.title: Kupanga-Kutsimikiziridwa
productionProven.description: Awa si matekinoloje owonetsera. Chida chilichonse chomwe chatchulidwa chimagwiritsa ntchito machitidwe enieni omwe amatumikira ogwiritsa ntchito enieni lero.

faq.subtitle: Maziko a Chidziwitso
faq.title: <gradient>Mafunso</gradient> Ofunsidwa Kawirikawiri
faq.description: Chilichonse chomwe muyenera kudziwa pakugwira ntchito ndi Horizon Tech

scope.question: Kodi ntchito yanu ndi yotani?
scope.answer: Timapereka ntchito zamakono zamakono: mapulogalamu ogwira ntchito mwachizolowezi, mapaipi a AI / ML, zomangamanga zamtambo, machitidwe a IoT, makina a DevOps, ndi kufunsira kusintha kwa digito. Kaya mukufuna nsanja yathunthu yomangidwa kuyambira pachiyambi kapena kuphatikiza kofunikira ndi nkhokwe yanu yomwe ilipo, timagwira ntchito zomangamanga, chitukuko, kuyesa, ndi kutumiza.

stack.question: Kodi nkhokwe yanu yaikulu yaukadaulo ndi chiyani?
stack.answer: Nkhokwe yathu yaikulu imakhala pamapulatifomu ogwira ntchito: Azure ndi AWS kwa mtambo, .NET ndi Node.js kwa backend, React ndi Angular kwa frontend, Kubernetes ndi Docker kwa orchestration, ndi Terraform kwa zomangamanga monga code. Timagwiranso ntchito kwambiri ndi Python pa ntchito za AI / ML, Power BI ndi Fabric kwa nzeru zamalonda, ndi PostgreSQL, SQL Server, ndi MongoDB kwa deta.

enterprise.question: Kodi mumachita bwanji ntchito zamakampani?
enterprise.answer: Kugwirizana kulikonse kumayamba ndi gawo lopeza kuti lifotokoze kukula, zomangamanga, ndi zochitika zazikulu. Mumapeza gulu lodzipereka lokhala ndi chitsogozo chaukadaulo, kuwunikira nthawi zonse, komanso kufikira mwachindunji mainjiniya omwe amamanga dongosolo lanu. Timatsatira kuthamanga kwa agile ndi ma demos okhudzidwa, kusunga matabwa a polojekiti yowonekera, ndikupereka malipoti opita patsogolo mlungu uliwonse.

support.question: Kodi chithandizo cha pambuyo pa kukhazikitsidwa chimawoneka bwanji?
support.answer: Timapereka ma tiers othandizira omwe ali ndi ma SLA ofotokozedwa, kuphatikizapo kuyang'anira 24 / 7, kuyankha zochitika, kukonza ntchito, ndi kusintha kwa mbali. Mapangano athu othandizira amaphimba kukonza zolakwika, mabala achitetezo, kuwonjezeka kwa zomangamanga, ndi kufufuza zaumoyo kwa proactive - zogwirizana ndi nthawi yanu yowonjezera komanso zofunikira za nthawi yoyankha.

integration.question: Kodi mutha kuphatikiza ndi zomangamanga zathu zomwe zilipo?
integration.answer: Mwamtheradi. Timakhazikika pakusintha kwamakono kwakale, kuphatikiza koyamba kwa API, ndi kusamuka kwa mtambo wa hybrid. Kaya mukufuna kulumikizana ndi machitidwe a ERP omwe ali pamalopo, kusamuka kuchokera ku monoliths kupita ku microservices, kapena kugwirizanitsa ma database akale ndi ma frontends amakono, tili ndi mabuku osewerera kusamuka ndi zochitika zophatikizira kuti zikhale zosasunthika.

industries.question: Kodi mwagwira nawo ntchito ziti?
industries.answer: Gulu lathu lapereka ntchito kudutsa fintech, zaumoyo, kayendetsedwe ka zinthu, e-commerce, mphamvu, ndi zigawo za boma. Timamvetsetsa zofunikira zamakampani monga PCI-DSS pamalipiro, malingaliro a HIPAA pazaumoyo, kutsatira GDPR pamisika ya EU, ndi telemetry yeniyeni ya mafakitale a mafakitale.

engagement.question: Kodi ndondomeko yodzipereka imawoneka bwanji?
engagement.answer: Zimayamba ndi kuyitana kupeza kuti mumvetsetse zolinga zanu ndi malo aukadaulo. Kuchokera pamenepo, timapereka chikalata chofufuzira ndi malangizo a zomangamanga, nthawi, ndi kuwonongeka kwa ndalama. Tikavomerezedwa, timayamba ndi gulu lodzipereka, kulowa m'zida zanu ndi ntchito zanu, ndikuyamba kuthamanga koyamba mkati mwa masiku.

faq.ctaDescription: Kodi muli ndi polojekiti m'maganizo? Tiyeni tikambirane kukula, nthawi, ndi bajeti.
